hero.title: Enhance Your Natural Beauty
hero.subtitle: Board-certified plastic surgeon in Thessaloniki, Greece. Combining artistry with surgical precision to help you look and feel your best.

about.title: About Dr. Chatzivantsidis
about.subtitle: Dedicated to Excellence in Plastic Surgery
about.bio: With over 15 years of experience in plastic and reconstructive surgery, Dr. Jorgis Chatzivantsidis is one of Thessaloniki's most respected board-certified plastic surgeons. He completed his medical degree at the Aristotle University of Thessaloniki and underwent specialized training in aesthetic surgery in leading European centers.
about.philosophy: Dr. Chatzivantsidis believes that plastic surgery should enhance your natural beauty, not transform it beyond recognition. Every procedure is tailored to the individual, with a focus on natural-looking results, patient safety, and a compassionate approach.
